Is this the appointment you want rescheduled? If so, please tell me one of the following so I can proceed:

1) A new date and time (e.g., "May 22 at 10:00"), or  
2) Your availability constraints (e.g., "next week, mornings only" or "any weekday after 2 PM"), or  
3) If you want me to pick the earliest available slot within a time window (tell me the window, e.g., "next 2 weeks, mornings").

Also tell me whether you want me to:
- Reschedule the calendar event and notify the clinic/participants (yes/no), and
- Include a custom message to the clinic when I reschedule (if yes, paste the message).

Once you give those details I’ll reschedule the event for you.
